subject: [TOX] Fix tox failures
commit_message:
[TOX] Fix tox failures

Use only gitlint-core as a dependency

Issue-ID: DOC-782
Signed-off-by: Michal Jagiello <michal.jagiello@t-mobile.pl>
Change-Id: Icc2097ad442cf73ee53bb526a1e84069e02b106f

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/5658/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/5658/ )

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

See https://github.com/openstack/requirements/blob/stable/yoga/upper-constraints.txt
The main issue is the missing upper-constraints for the following packags:
PyEnchant
pylint
autopep8
gitlint-core

Ideally we should add them in https://git.onap.org/doc/tree/etc/upper-constraints.onap.txt
or in a constraint file in your project.

Let me check the best versions and I will update doc's upper constraint files.
